name: I got hit by a forklift at work in Murray Utah what do I do right now?

mainEntity.name: I got hit by a forklift at work in Murray Utah what do I do right now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Get medical help now, report to supervisor, file workers' comp claim via Form 122. Utah covers on-job forklift injuries.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Seek immediate medical attention, report the accident to your supervisor, and file a workers' compensation claim promptly.** Forklift accidents on the job in Utah are typically covered under the state's Workers’ Compensation Act, which provides benefits for injuries arising out of and in the course of employment without proving fault.[3] Key factors include getting treatment to document injuries, ensuring your employer files Form 122 within seven days, and avoiding delays that could jeopardize benefits.[3] Contact the Utah Labor Commission if needed, and consider consulting an attorney if complications arise; do not give recorded statements to insurance without advice.[2][3] Utah law protects against retaliation for filing claims.[2]

description: Get medical help now, report to supervisor, file workers' comp claim via Form 122. Utah covers on-job forklift injuries.[3]
